title: Pixel Valley
description: A animal crossing & Stardew valley inspried game built in Godot

title: Home Assistant via Cloudflare Tunnel
description: Securely exposed a self-hosted Home Assistant instance to the internet via a cloudflare tunnel with zero-trust access implemented for remote control of home automation.

title: DF-Story Teller
description: AI Driven dwarf fortress story generator. Legends mode reader, live event viewer and dfhack integration used together to generate a narrative that fits your world
